rules.rule_text:
rule Raccoon
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Raccoon system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "System Information:" ascii
		$x2 = "Bot_ID:" ascii
		$x3 = "Launched at:" ascii
		$x4 = "Build compile date:" ascii
		$x5 = "Installed Apps:" ascii
		$x6 = "-------------" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
